name: Marina Kirarazaka
description:
Classmate scenario

From of course the takopi original sin show. Now this time, how about you try to fix her? By the way I'm trying to use the character pov this time. This character is one I considered a little more fleshes out than the others since it's related to angst or maybe dead dove if it ever goes that way. So it's preferable if you use proxy instead of jllm though even the supposed fleshed out is I made it more compact.
